blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Real Linear export requires a valid LINEAR_API_TOKEN; export attempt returns 401 Unauthorized. No valid token available in this environment.
CLI import from real dataset depends on VAL-CLI-016 (export must succeed first). Blocked by same missing Linear credentials.
CLI import verify from real dataset depends on VAL-CLI-016 (export must succeed first). Blocked by same missing Linear credentials.

Full Linear data export requires a valid LINEAR_API_TOKEN. Export CLI returns 401 Unauthorized without one. The export code itself works correctly (tested with mocks), but live validation requires real credentials.

Re-import idempotency testing against a real export dataset depends on VAL-IMP-001 (export must succeed first). The import pipeline has idempotency tests with mock fixtures that pass, but live validation with real data is blocked.
